title: The Gospel of Peter — Passion Material
source_edition: Bouriant 1892 (Akhmim Codex, *Mémoires publiés par les membres de la Mission archéologique française au Caire* 9). Public domain.
date_of_composition: Manuscript 8th–9th century (Akhmim Codex); underlying text mid-2nd century.
scope_note: Selected passion material (vv. 1–5: trial and washing of hands; vv. 6–13, 15–20: mocking and crucifixion; vv. 21–24: burial; vv. 50–57: women at the tomb). The talking-cross episode (vv. 35–42, 44–49) and the giant-Jesus episode are excluded as later legendary embellishment.
completeness_note: Greek text not yet sourced into this JSON corpus; pending follow-up session.
follow_up_needed: Fetch Greek text from Bouriant 1892 (the *editio princeps*); also Foster 2010 *The Gospel of Peter* (Brill) for accessible critical edition.
